creator: aleksej.rukin@gmail.com
text:
The audacious-plugins pkg on FreeBSD lacks the Amidi plugin, leaving users without MIDI playback. This can be a major inconvenience for former Linux users that have switched to FreeBSD and expect the same feature set as on Linux.

A similar request was posted as early as in 2010 (147277), but the current pkg still does not have this plugin enabled.
